name: Tipsy Squire
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line the bottom of a square pan (9 x 9 x 2) with waxed paper. Mix flour and baking powder; set aside.
2. Beat eggs and sugar in a large bowl on high speed for about 3 minutes, or until thick and lemony. Add milk and vanilla, beating on low speed. Stir in the flour mixture; fold in butter carefully. Pour into pan.
3. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean. Let cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pan and let cool completely. Prepare Sherry Custard Sauce. Beat whipping cream in a chilled bowl until stiff. Cut the cooled cake into serving pieces; split each piece horizontally. Place the bottom half on a serving plate and top with about 3 tablespoons of custard sauce. Cover with the other half and top with another 2-3 tablespoons of custard sauce. Garnish with whipped cream and toasted slivered almonds.
